mapper.select: SELECT cgm.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, af.url AS avatarFrame, cgm.role, cgm.nickname_in_group AS nicknameInGroup, cgm.is_muted AS isMuted, cgm.muted_until AS mutedUntil, CASE WHEN u.is_online = 'online' THEN 'online' ELSE 'offline' END AS isOnline, cgm.join_time AS joinTime, u.level, u.vip_type AS vipType FROM chat_group_member cgm INNER JOIN user u ON cgm.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user_avatar_frame uaf ON u.id = uaf.user_id AND uaf.is_using = 1 LEFT JOIN avatar_frame af ON uaf.frame_id = af.id WHERE cgm.group_id = #{groupId} AND cgm.leave_time IS NULL ORDER BY CASE cgm.role WHEN 'owner' THEN 0 WHEN 'admin' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, cgm.join_time ASC
